component.name: Monitor
component.summary: Manage display monitors on Pop OS

description.p: Monitor is a simple GUI app for Pop OS that makes managing multiple displays easy. Set your primary (default) monitor with one click, and identify which physical screen corresponds to which DisplayPort by dimming all other monitors.

ul.li: Lists all connected monitors with resolution, refresh rate, and physical size
Set the primary monitor with one click
Identify any monitor by dimming all others
Cycle through all monitors to see which port is which
